sellers_note: This 2024 Lamorghini Urus S is being offered with 8,490 miles on the odometer! The exterior of this Urus S is finished in Grigio Keres, complemented by a Nero Ade with Rosso Alala Stitching interior! The options on this Urus S include: Featured Options - 23 Inch Taigete Wheels in Shiny Black - Red Brake Calipers - Style Package in High Gloss Black with Front Splitter - Mirror Housings in High Gloss Black - Privacy Glass, Acoustic and Heat Insulated - Hands Free Tailgate - Soft Close Doors - Optional Stitching in Rosso Alala - Multi-function Steering Wheel in Smooth Leather - Optional Stitching on Steering Wheel - Full Electric Front Seats with Ventilation and Massage - Heated Front Seats - Embroidered Lamborghini Shield on Headrest - Q-Citura on Leather - Alcantara Headliner - Inserts in Black Piano - Inserts in Brushed Aluminum - Advanced 3D Bang & Olufsen Sound System - Lamborghini ANIMA with Off-Road Modes - Off-Road Modes with Trailer Towing Prep - Ambient Light Package - Premium Air Quality System - Floor Mats with Leather Piping and Double Stitching - Park Assistance Package with Remote ParkAssist - Head Up Display - Garage Door Opener - Lamborghini Smartphone Interface (Apple CarPlay- Android Auto) This 2024 Lamborghini Urus S is being offered with the Balance of the Factory Warranty which is good until 11/30/2026. It also has a one year extended warranty which is good until 11/30/2027. As with all the rare and exotic sports cars sold here at McLaren Philadelphia, this vehicle has passed through our own strenuous 100-point inspection. McLaren Philadelphia is proud to be one of the original nine McLaren dealerships in the United States and the highest volume McLaren dealership in the world. We retail and service the full McLaren model line in addition to offering the finest pre-owned luxury vehicles. Come see this car and many more at our premier dealership location in West Chester, Pennsylvania ri Financing available on all vehicles and leasing available on select vehicles. Extended warranties available as well.Our dealership location in West Chester, PA provides a close proximity to Philadelphia , D.C, MD and NY.
